message: Hi, my debit card was declined twice today even though I have money in my account. This is urgent, I need to pay rent this afternoon.
I noticed a transaction on my credit card statement for $340 that I did not make. Please look into this immediately.
Can you tell me what documents I need to apply for a personal loan of around 5 lakhs?
I've been trying to log into my savings account app for two days and it keeps saying invalid password even after I reset it.
What are the current interest rates for a 20-year home loan?
Your customer service kept me on hold for 45 minutes yesterday and then the call dropped. I'm extremely unhappy with this experience.
I want to increase the credit limit on my Meridian Platinum card, is that something I can request online?
My mother passed away last month and had a savings account with you. What is the process to close the account?
Someone called claiming to be from Meridian Bank asking for my card PIN over the phone. I didn't give it but wanted to report this.
Just wanted to check my current savings account balance and recent transactions from the last week.
